zh.Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-Franc: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Towneley於1387年5月14日出生在英國藍卡爾堂勒時，他的父親John de Towneley29歲，母親Isabelle de Rixton27歲。他於1412年與Alice Haworth在英國藍卡爾華拉利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1454年9月30日在英國藍卡爾達頓享年67歲。

zh-hans.Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-Franc: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Towneley于1387年5月14日出生在英国藍卡爾堂勒时，他的父亲John de Towneley29岁，母亲Isabelle de Rixton27岁。他于1412年与Alice Haworth在英国藍卡爾華拉利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1454年9月30日在英国藍卡爾達頓享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Towneley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Townley
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Towneley near Burnley in Lancashire, which is named with Middle English toun(e), ton(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn) + leie ‘glade, clearing’. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Towneley was born on 14 May 1387, in Towneley, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Towneley, was 29 and his mother, Isabelle de Rixton, was 27. He married Alice Haworth in 1412, in Whalley, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 30 September 1454, in Dutton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Towneley est né le 14 mai 1387, à Towneley, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John de Towneley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Rixton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice Haworth en 1412, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1454, à Dutton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Towneley am 14. Mai 1387 in Towneley, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Towneley 29 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Rixton 27. Er hat 1412 in Whalley, Lancashire, England Alice Haworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 30. September 1454 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Dutton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Towneley è nato il il 14 maggio 1387 nel Towneley, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John de Towneley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Rixton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice Haworth nel 1412, nel Whalley, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 30 settembre 1454, nel Dutton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Towneleyが1387年5月14日にイギリスランカシュアイアトウニリーで生まれた時，父John de Towneleyは29歳，母Isabelle de Rixtonは27歳であった。1412年にイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーでAlice Haworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1454年9月30日にイギリスランカシュアイアダットオンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Towneley(이)가 1387년 5월 14일 영국 랭카실르 타운리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Towneley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Rixton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1412년 영국 랭카실르 화알리에서 Alice Haworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1454년 9월 30일 영국 랭카실르 드턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.14 May 1387–30 September 1454: 14 de maio de 1387–30 de setembro de 1454
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Towneley nasceu em 14 de maio de 1387, em Towneley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Towneley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Rixton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Haworth em 1412, em Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1454, em Dutton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Towneley родился 14 мая 1387 г. в местности тоунели, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Towneley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Rixton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Haworth в 1412 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 30 сентября 1454 г. в местности дуттон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.14 May 1387–30 September 1454: 14 de mayo de 1387–30 de septiembre de 1454
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Towneley nació el 14 de mayo de 1387, en Towneley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Towneley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Rixton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice Haworth en 1412, en Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1454, en Dutton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
